qual: ((( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) = sender_profile_id) OR (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) = receiver_profile_id))

policyname: Users can send messages in own applications
with_check:
((( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) = sender_profile_id) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM applications a
  WHERE ((a.id = application_messages.application_id) AND ((a.student_profile_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) OR (a.company_profile_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid))) AND (((( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) = a.student_profile_id) AND (application_messages.receiver_profile_id = a.company_profile_id)) OR ((( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) = a.company_profile_id) AND (application_messages.receiver_profile_id = a.student_profile_id)))))))
